Hero.videoAria: Slow aerial views of Sicily, silent, cinematic intro
Hero.title: A slower way to experience Sicily
Hero.subtitle: A cultural journal exploring the Mediterranean way of life.

Home.manifesto1: Sicily is for travellers who want more than a backdrop for photos: layers of history in stone and story, light that changes the sea by the hour, food that still follows the seasons, and towns that feel genuinely lived in.
Home.manifesto2: Our services are designed for people who expect quality in every experience: careful planning, trusted local partners, and itineraries built around your rhythm, not a one-size-fits-all package.
Home.manifestoQuote: Here, the reward is in the small things: a view, a meal, a stretch of road. Our job is to leave you free to notice them.
Home.discoverImageAlt: View of Sicily, coast and landscape
Home.journalLead: One story each week about Culture & History, Lifestyle, Places, and Letters.
Home.aboutTitle: A cultural bridge between Sicily and those who love it.
Home.aboutBody:
Del Moro Sicily exists so you can experience Sicily without a worry.
We take care of every detail of your stay, so you can simply give in to the moment.

We don’t just arrange trips: we craft bespoke experiences built on beauty, authenticity, and freedom.

Sicily, as you’ve never lived it before.
Home.letterBody: Letters, news, promotions... subscribe to receive the latest updates from Del Moro Sicily.
Home.experiencesLead: Our experiences are built so you can travel without a worry: we take care of itineraries, transfers, stays, and every detail. You simply enjoy Sicily.
Home.experiencesTileHistoryAlt: Ancient stone columns and historic architecture
Home.experiencesTileRentalAlt: Car on a scenic road by the sea
Home.experiencesTileStaysAlt: Refined villa exterior with pool and garden

About.label: About
About.title: Del Moro Sicily
About.intro: A service created and led by Gabriele.
About.p1: Del Moro is a service created and led by Gabriele, a Sicilian guy with a passion for his land and everything that makes it unique: light, landscapes, flavours, and people.
About.p2: The idea is simple: create authentic, bespoke experiences in Sicily, with care for details and for each traveler’s rhythm.
About.p3: From tours in Western Sicily to private services (cars, boats, private parties, and special moments), each request is curated discreetly and with real local presence.

Experiences.label: Experiences
Experiences.title: Western Sicily, and beyond
Experiences.galleryLead: Mood and details connected to this experience.
Experiences.intro: Four themes to guide you through history, nature, mobility, and stays. Below you will also find bespoke services: car hire, rooms and villas, boats, and everything your trip needs.

storia.body: Paths through Sicily’s memory: layered architecture, the language of stone, and stories that read the landscape slowly.

natura.body: Trails, coastlines, and inland silence: Sicily as a breath of air, away from the obvious circuits.

noleggio.body: Cars, boats, and selected skippers: discreet, safe mobility tailored to you.

alloggi.body: Villas, homes, and stays chosen with care, tuned to the island’s rhythm.

tours.title: Palermo & Monreale
tours.lead: A day among historic markets, street food, and the golden light of Norman mosaics.
details: We move through historic markets and lively streets, stopping where food truly tells Palermo’s story.
In the afternoon we head to Monreale to end the day with quiet panoramas and Norman mosaics.

tours.title: Zingaro & San Vito
tours.lead: Sea trails, clear coves, a simple lunch, and sunset on the coast.
details: A real sea day: light walks, stops in coves, and time to swim without rushing.
We finish in San Vito Lo Capo with beach time and a sunset close to the water.

tours.title: Erice & Marsala
tours.lead: Hilltop views, wind, salt pans at dusk, and a winery tasting.
details: Erice is stone, wind, and endless views: we move slowly through lanes and small shops.
Later we head to the salt pans, then close with a tasting around Marsala.

tours.title: Temples & Scala dei Turchi
tours.lead: Archaeology and sea: ancient columns and white cliffs in one day.
details: Morning among the temples, with pauses to understand the place without turning it into a checklist.
In the afternoon we go to Scala dei Turchi for sea time and light on the white rock.

tours.title: Favignana by boat
tours.lead: Stops in the most beautiful coves, slow time in the water, lunch on board.
details: A boat day among Favignana’s iconic coves: stops, swims, and a relaxed pace.
Lunch on board and return in late afternoon with the best light.

tours.title: Noto, Modica, Ragusa
tours.lead: Baroque towns, chocolate, piazzas, and an unhurried evening among pale stone.
details: Two days to breathe the Baroque: Noto in the morning, Modica for a sweet pause, and Ragusa Ibla for an unhurried evening.
Day two stays flexible: views, shops, and empty time, because that’s what you remember.

Experiences.otherServicesImageAlt: Two people on a scooter on a country road
Experiences.otherServicesLead:
To make your Sicily experience even easier and more unforgettable, we offer a range of additional services designed for every need.

From booking exclusive restaurants to private transfers, from organising special events to personalised support throughout your stay, we take care of every detail for you.

Whether it’s a romantic surprise, a last-minute request, or something completely tailored, our goal is to let you experience Sicily without a worry.

You relax — we’ll take care of the rest.
otherServices: Car hire with delivery and pickup

Journal.label: Journal
Journal.title: Stories of a place that moves at its own pace
Journal.intro: Four editorial lines: one new piece every week.
Journal.guideCtaLead: A digital guide and audio experience, a small cultural companion, not a travel package.

cultureHistory.title: Culture & History
cultureHistory.description: Architecture, stratified memories, and the civilizations that shaped the island.

lifestyle.title: Lifestyle
lifestyle.description: Slow rituals, community, food as sustenance and story, and light as measure of the day.

places.title: Places
places.description: Olives and boats, inland silence and coastline: geography felt, not listed.

letters.title: Letters
letters.description: Poetic notes on belonging, solitude, return, and why Sicily stays with you.

Article.furtherLead: Share this story with someone who loves thoughtful travel.
Article.subscribeLead: Letters, news, promotions... subscribe to receive the latest updates from Del Moro Sicily.

Guides.label: Phase 2
Guides.title: Guides, in time
Guides.p1: We are building a small collection of cultural digital guides for our readers, written with the same care as the Journal, never sold like standard travel products.
Guides.p2: For now, follow the weekly stories. The guides will arrive quietly, when the editorial voice is ready.

CookieBanner.title: Cookie preferences
CookieBanner.description: This site uses technical cookies necessary for it to work. We do not use profiling or marketing cookies. You can update your choice at any time.

CookiePolicy.label: Legal
CookiePolicy.title: Cookie policy
CookiePolicy.intro: This notice covers the Del Moro Sicily website, which presents travel experiences in Sicily, editorial content, and enquiry forms. The business owner is Gabriele Virzì.
CookiePolicy.body:
What cookies are: small files or identifiers stored on your device when you visit a site. They often keep the site working, remember preferences, or measure how pages are used.

What we use on this site: we use cookies and tools that are strictly necessary for secure operation (for example language handling where available, security, and performance). We do not use third-party behavioural advertising cookies unless separately documented and unless you give consent where the law requires it.

Your consent choices: the cookie banner lets you accept or reject non-essential categories when they exist. Your choice is stored locally in your browser (for example via local storage) so we do not show the message on every visit. You can change your decision at any time using the dedicated control on the page.

Contact: for questions about this policy, use the addresses on the Contact page. The commercial and editorial project is Del Moro Sicily, curated by Gabriele Virzì.

PrivacyPolicy.label: Legal
PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: Your privacy matters. This notice explains how we process personal data when you visit Del Moro Sicily, read the journal, browse experiences, or send a request. The site promotes travel and experiences in Sicily and related services (tours, rentals, stays, and similar), curated by Gabriele Virzì.
PrivacyPolicy.body:
Data controller: Gabriele Virzì, as the person responsible for the Del Moro Sicily brand and project. To exercise your rights or for privacy questions, use the contacts on the Contact page (email and other details shown there).

Categories of data: we may process identity and contact details (name, surname, email, phone), content you type into forms (messages, travel preferences, indicative dates), technical browsing data generated automatically (IP address, browser type, access times in aggregated or technical log form), and, if you join the newsletter, the email address needed to send it.

Purposes and legal bases: (1) responding to enquiries sent through forms and preparing experience proposals or quotes: processing necessary to take steps at your request (Article 6(1)(b) GDPR) or, where not yet contractual, legitimate interest in handling visitor correspondence; (2) newsletter communications, only with your consent where required (Article 6(1)(a) GDPR); (3) site security, abuse prevention, and legal obligations (Article 6(1)(c) and (f) GDPR).

Retention: we keep data for as long as needed to handle the request and for any later accounting or tax duties, unless the law requires longer. Technical logs may be kept for limited periods compatible with service security.

Recipients: data may be processed by suppliers who support us (hosting, email, site management) as processors under GDPR-compliant arrangements where applicable. We do not sell your personal data.

Transfers outside the EEA: if we use providers outside the European Economic Area, we apply appropriate safeguards (for example the European Commission’s standard contractual clauses) where required.

Your rights: you may request access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, objection where applicable, portability of data you supplied in a structured format, and withdrawal of consent for consent-based activities. You may lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority.

Changes: we will update this notice if purposes or tools change; please review it periodically.

Terms.label: Legal
Terms.title: Terms and conditions
Terms.intro: These terms govern access to and use of the Del Moro Sicily website, a project by Gabriele Virzì focused on experiences in Sicily, editorial content, and contact channels. By using the site you accept the version published at the time of use.
Terms.body:
Nature of the service: the site provides information on itineraries, travel themes, ancillary services (such as rentals and stays), and journal articles. Descriptions are general and promotional: a service is confirmed only after written communication between the parties (for example a confirmation email or commercial agreement), with economic and operational terms defined case by case.

Permitted use: you may not use the site unlawfully, to disturb other users, to attempt unauthorised access, to extract data through unauthorised aggressive scraping, or to infringe third-party rights.

Intellectual property: texts, photographs, videos, Del Moro Sicily marks, logos, and layout are owned by Gabriele Virzì or licensors and are protected by copyright and trade mark law. You may share links to pages; extensive reproduction of content without written permission is not allowed, except as permitted by law (quotation, personal use).

Limitation of liability: we aim to keep information accurate and up to date but do not warrant freedom from errors or uninterrupted service. We are not liable for indirect damages, lost profits, or inability to travel based solely on online information without direct confirmation. Links to third-party sites are provided for convenience; we do not control external content.

Governing law and jurisdiction: unless mandatory rules say otherwise, these terms are governed by Italian law. For disputes arising from use of the site, the courts of Palermo, Italy, shall have jurisdiction, without prejudice to mandatory consumer protections.

Changes: Gabriele Virzì may update these terms; the version in force is the one published on this page. Continued use of the site after publication of changes implies acceptance of the new terms where the law allows.
